suites.label: Application-submission routes ACL — anon→403/302 (GET+POST), auth-with-perm→200 (GET)
suites.command:
python3 -c "import os,sys,subprocess
base=os.environ.get("FORSETI_BASE_URL","http://localhost")
auth=os.environ.get("FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED","")
JID="99999"
GET_ROUTES=[
  "/jobhunter/application-submission",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}",
  "/application-submission",
  f"/application-submission/{JID}",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/resolve-redirect-chain",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/identify-auth-path",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/create-account",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/submit-application",
]
POST_ROUTES=[
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/identify-auth-path",
  f"/application-submission/{JID}/identify-auth-path",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/create-account",
  f"/application-submission/{JID}/create-account",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/submit-application",
  f"/application-submission/{JID}/submit-application",
  f"/jobhunter/application-submission/{JID}/step/3",
]
def curl_code(url,cookie="",method="GET"):
  cmd=["curl","--max-time","10","-o","/dev/null","-w","%{http_code}","-s","-X",method]
  if cookie: cmd+=["-H","Cookie: "+cookie]
  cmd.append(url)
  return subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip()
failures=[]
for path in GET_ROUTES:
  c=curl_code(base+path)
  print(f"ANON GET {path}: {c}")
  if c not in ("403","302"): failures.append(f"AC-ACL-01 FAIL ANON GET {path}: got {c}")
for path in POST_ROUTES:
  c=curl_code(base+path,method="POST")
  print(f"ANON POST {path}: {c}")
  if c not in ("403","302"): failures.append(f"AC-ACL-02 FAIL ANON POST {path}: got {c}")
if auth:
  for path in GET_ROUTES:
    c=curl_code(base+path,cookie=auth)
    print(f"AUTH GET {path}: {c}")
    if c!="200": failures.append(f"AC-ACL-03 FAIL AUTH GET {path}: got {c}")
else: print("AC-ACL-03: SKIP - FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED not set")
[print(f,file=sys.stderr) for f in failures]
sys.exit(1 if failures else 0)
"
run_notes: AC-ACL-01: anon GET all 8 wizard step routes → 403 or 302.
AC-ACL-02: anon POST all 7 wizard step POST routes → 403 or 302.
AC-ACL-03: authenticated user with 'access job hunter' GET routes → 200 (skipped if FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED unset).
fixture job_id=99999 used for parameterized paths; controllers return graceful 200/403 without requiring a real DB fixture.
Coverage driven by explicit route enumeration per AC-ACL-01/02/03 in feature.md.

suites.label: Open redirect fix: //evil.com rejected (->my-jobs), valid /path accepted, http://evil.com rejected (TC-02 TC-03 TC-04)
suites.command:
bash -c 'BASE=${FORSETI_BASE_URL:-https://forseti.life}; COOKIE=${FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED:-}; HEADERS="-H \"Cookie: $COOKIE\""; FAILURES=0
# TC-02: protocol-relative rejected
DEST=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{redirect_url}" -L --max-redirs 3 -b "$COOKIE" "$BASE/jobhunter/my-jobs?return_to=//evil.com" 2>/dev/null)
echo "TC-02 //evil.com redirect: $DEST"
echo "$DEST" | grep -qv "evil.com" && echo "TC-02 PASS: //evil.com not in final destination" || (echo "TC-02 FAIL: open redirect to //evil.com still works" && FAILURES=$((FAILURES+1)))
# TC-03: valid path accepted
DEST3=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{redirect_url}" -L --max-redirs 3 -b "$COOKIE" "$BASE/jobhunter/my-jobs?return_to=/jobhunter/my-jobs" 2>/dev/null)
echo "TC-03 valid path redirect: $DEST3"
echo "$DEST3" | grep -q "jobhunter" && echo "TC-03 PASS" || echo "TC-03 WARN: valid path may not have been followed (check manually)"
# TC-04: absolute URL rejected
DEST4=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{redirect_url}" -L --max-redirs 3 -b "$COOKIE" "$BASE/jobhunter/my-jobs?return_to=http://evil.com" 2>/dev/null)
echo "TC-04 http://evil.com redirect: $DEST4"
echo "$DEST4" | grep -qv "evil.com" && echo "TC-04 PASS: absolute URL not followed" || (echo "TC-04 FAIL: absolute URL redirect" && FAILURES=$((FAILURES+1)))
[ $FAILURES -eq 0 ] && echo "ALL PASS" || (echo "FAILURES: $FAILURES" && exit 1)'
suites.notes: Requires FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED env var. TC-02 is the critical security check; TC-03 is regression-guard. The return_to parameter test route may vary by controller — verify against an actual company delete/action route if /jobhunter/my-jobs does not use return_to directly.

suites.label: TC-1: Match score badge visible on /jobhunter/my-jobs (smoke)

suites.label: TC-3: Score is 0% when no skill overlap

suites.label: TC-6: Scores are embedded server-side (no extra AJAX fetch required)

suites.label: TC-8: No error when job has no requirements data

suites.label: TC-3: Submit thumbs-down rating — DB row with rating=down

suites.notes: Verifies HTTP 200 on thumbs-down POST with valid CSRF token and empty note.

suites.label: TC-4: Update existing feedback — row updated not duplicated

suites.label: TC-5: Widget pre-selects prior rating on revisit

suites.notes: Boundary validation: 501-char note must be rejected with HTTP 422. No DB row created/updated.

suites.notes: Security: verifies note is sanitized before storage. The <script> tag must not appear in the stored DB value.

suites.label: TC-10: CSRF token required — POST without token returns 403

suites.notes: CSRF gate: authenticated POST without ?token= URL param must return 403. Route must use _csrf_token: TRUE with URL query token pattern (not POST body). Consistent with org CSRF delivery rule.

suites.label: TC-4: At most 3 jobs returned in job_suggestions

suites.label: TC-1: Trigger phrase 'show my saved jobs' returns job_suggestions array in response

Response: {d}\"; print(\"PASS\")"'

suites.label: TC-2: Multiple trigger phrases all return job_suggestions

suites.label: Installation Cluster Communication (federation handshake + service layer)
notes: Requires two local Forseti installations with distinct base URLs.
Trust/bootstrap material must be configured outside synced public config.
Most tests require manual execution until CI multi-node environment is available.

test_cases.description: Register a peer installation and complete a successful signed handshake; peer enters pending_review before operator approval
Operator can review mission/value attestation and elevate or deny admission based on alignment
Publish at least one agent_expertise capability and one institutional_service capability across two admitted nodes
Submit a valid service request from node A to node B, accept it, issue status update, mark completed
Mark a capability as approval_required; verify request pauses for operator decision before execution
Send a message with an invalid signature; confirm rejection with explicit audit log output
Replay a previously accepted message; confirm rejection or idempotent handling without duplicate state changes
Suspend a peer; confirm outbound and inbound cluster exchanges are blocked
Admin UI shows peer status, last handshake, mission alignment state, recent message outcomes, and request lifecycle history

_schema_notes: Suite entries MAY include an optional 'feature_id' field when the suite was added for a specific groomed feature.
feature_id links back to features/<feature_id>/ — the living requirements document.
Suites without feature_id are baseline regression tests.
